message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for client + connection + config (br-frankenredis-u8qc, 4e32, mly9)

First-run parity vs vendored redis-server:
  - core_client:     transport wedge on CLIENT REPLY OFF (bcww)
  - core_connection: transport error on HELLO 3 (RESP3 map '%' — ozcx)
  - core_config:     128/157 pass, 29 divergences (2di1)

Divergences filed as [HIGH] review beads:
  - bcww (P2): CLIENT REPLY OFF harness wedge — needs no-reply detector
  - ozcx:      RESP3 map parser missing in fr-protocol
  - 2di1:      CONFIG GET/SET/REWRITE wording + default-value drift

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
